scripts.build: npm run build -w @guanmao/agent && npm run build -w @guanmao/server && npm run build -w @guanmao/web && npm run build -w @guanmao/cli && npm run build -w @guanmao/desktop-ui && npm run build:desktop:go
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @guanmao/agent && npm run dev -w @guanmao/server
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @guanmao/agent && npm run dev -w @guanmao/web
scripts.dev:cli: npm run build -w @guanmao/agent && npm run dev -w @guanmao/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @guanmao/agent && npm run typecheck -w @guanmao/server && npm run typecheck -w @guanmao/web && npm run typecheck -w @guanmao/cli && npm run typecheck -w @guanmao/desktop-ui
